name: dwellium-desktop
description: Dwellium — standalone desktop build (SPA + bundled Node backend sidecar).

dependencies.//: Recall.ai Desktop Recording SDK — BACKGROUND (botless, private) meeting capture. NOTHING joins the call; it records the Mac locally and forwards a live transcript. Ships a native helper binary (desktop_sdk_macos_exe / agent-windows.exe) + bundled GStreamer, so `npm install` MUST run on the Mac (electron-builder packages + signs it there; the Linux build sandbox cannot install/sign native deps). Apple-Silicon Mac + Windows only — init() throws on any other platform. Code-signing: the .app MUST be signed with Recall's osx-sign fork (mic/screen/system-audio entitlements + hardened runtime) or macOS kills the recorder; see electron/README.md and the report.
